subject: A humanoid figure in dark ornate armor surging forward, wreathed in fire and magenta energy, breaking free from something
description: A humanoid figure in elaborate dark armor lunges dynamically forward across a stormy grey-blue sky. The armor features intricate scroll-worked detailing in dark tones, with fire and orange embers trailing behind as if the figure is tearing free of bonds. Both hands are outstretched, emanating pink and magenta magical energy. The figure has long dark hair streaming back. A gold circlet or headpiece is visible. The figure's expression reads as strained determination or defiance. The overall composition conveys violent release — chains or bonds breaking rather than being wielded.
foreground: Armored humanoid figure mid-lunge, orange fire and pink magic erupting from body
background: Stormy grey-blue sky with fire embers and debris
emotion: strained defiance — body language of violent liberation
